# UC-22.8.40 · SOC 2 CC7.4 — Cisco ISE Adaptive Network Control Containment Audit

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance

*We continuously evidence SOC 2 CC7.4 — ANC containment audit covering all automated incident response actions. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We continuously evidence SOC 2 CC7.4 — ANC containment audit covering all automated incident response actions.

## Value

SOC 2 auditors will request continuous evidence of incident response. ANC action audit (with attribution showing whether action was SOAR-driven, manual-admin, or pxGrid-publisher driven) is the audit-quality artefact.

## Implementation

Daily.

## Evidence

Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with SOC 2 CC7.4 tagging.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

ANC quarantine fires. Evidence captured with attribution.

### Negative scenario

No ANC activity. Empty result.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.42 operational.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.8.40: SOC 2 CC7.4 — ANC Audit Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.8.40,reg=SOC2,clause=CC7.4
```

Quarterly review with SOC 2 service auditor; annual evidence pack for Type II report.

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (86001, 86002, 86003) earliest=-1d
| stats count, dc(endpoint_mac) as endpoints by anc_action, anc_policy, initiator
| eval soc2_clause="CC7.4", control="Incident_Response_Audit"
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

SOC 2 CC7.4 panel: ANC action timeline; per-policy ANC action count.

## Known False Positives

1. SOAR playbook test runs — annotate with playbook test ID.
